name_en: 🚩🚩🚩Diamond-encrusted Channel is the most heart-fluttering bag🤩🤩 You deserve it II This style is not common, so it's very popular! Let's talk about this bag: The leather is high quality and feels incredibly comfortable to the touch. The hardware work is superb!!! The capacity is not large, but it is mini, able to hold simple shopping essentials. In short, this bag is stylish yet refined, and it goes well with dresses 👗 You got this.
